title: Transmon Qubits: The Workhorse of Superconducting Quantum Computing
description: Understand the physics and design of transmon qubits - the most widely used superconducting qubit architecture. Learn about charge noise immunity, anharmonicity, and the Josephson junction physics that makes quantum computing possible.
learningObjectives: Explain the physics of Josephson junctions and their role in superconducting qubits
Describe how transmon qubits achieve charge noise immunity through the EJ/EC ratio
Calculate transmon energy levels and anharmonicity
Analyze the trade-offs between charge noise immunity and anharmonicity
Understand transmon qubit parameters and their typical values in modern devices
